calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #5, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-20-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of 5th And Final Account For Trust A
Off Calendar Aug-09-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Trustee John Harms and the Attorney John Hayes to appear and show cause as to why the Fifth Account for Trust-A has not been filed. The return date is September 13, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Various Bailiffs.

Off the record: The Court found that this matter was calendared in error. The Order to Show Cause will not be issued. The matter was taken off calendar.
